validationRule.title: Header timestamp is older than 65 seconds
validationRule.errorDescription: The data in a GTFS-realtime feed should always be less than one minute old
validationRule.occurrenceSuffix: old which is greater than the recommended age of 65 seconds

validationRule.title: GTFS-rt agency_id does not exist in GTFS data
validationRule.errorDescription: All agency_ids provided in the GTFS-rt alert.informed_entity.agency_id should also exist in GTFS agency.txt
validationRule.occurrenceSuffix: does not exist in the GTFS data agency.txt

validationRule.title: GTFS-rt stop_id does not exist in GTFS data
validationRule.errorDescription: All stop_ids referenced in GTFS-rt feeds must exist in GTFS stops.txt
validationRule.occurrenceSuffix: does not exist in GTFS data stops.txt
